svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "Blackbird Hornpipe (1)"

text.tspan: D D G C | D G D A7
D D C D | D G C D·
Source: Amanda Kerr, Randal Bays + Dave Marshall (with my own licks added)
Notes: Another new tune for me. Seems to have a lot in common with The Blackbird (set dance?),
with its repeated landing on the open D, but is also recognizably distinct. Still figuring out
chords and fine-tuning the arrangement. One interesting feature is a "slippery" C, sometimes
sharp in line with with the key signature and sometimes dropping down to natural.
